data.title: Trump says he regrets appointing Powell to the Fed in longest tirade to date
data.description:
President Donald Trump unloaded his longest attack yet on Jerome Powell on Friday evening, five months after moving back into the White House. Speaking via Truth Social, Trump said he should’ve never made Powell head of the Federal Reserve and once again blamed him for costing the US up to $1 trillion a year by […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-says-he-regrets-appointing-powell/

data.title: Shares of Coinbase and Circle Explode in Value After US Senate Passes Landmark Stablecoin Bill
data.description:
The shares of the crypto exchange Coinbase (COIN) and the stablecoin company Circle (CRCL) saw significant gains after US senators passed a landmark law to regulate stablecoins. The US Senate on Wednesday voted 68-30 with bipartisan support in favor of the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U. S
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/20/shares-of-coinbase-and-circle-explode-in-value-after-us-senate-passes-landmark-stablecoin-bill/

data.title: Bloomberg Analyst: The probability of most spot crypto ETFs being approved has been raised to 90% or higher
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bloomberg analysts Eric Balchunas and James Seyffart said that the probability of approval for most spot crypto ETFs has been raised to 90% or higher, saying that the positive interaction of the US SEC is an important signal. However, the two pointed out that the specific approval or launch time is still uncertain, which may be in the next one or two months, or it may be postponed until after October, emphasizing that this is a question of "when it happens" rather than "whether it happens."

data.title: $20 billion pulled from global equity funds in a week as Iran-Israel conflict worsens
data.description:
Nearly $20 billion was pulled out of global equity funds last week as the war between Iran and Israel pushed investors straight into panic mode. The massive retreat totaled $19. 82 billion by June 18, based on data published by LSEG Lipper, making it the largest weekly outflow in three months. The sell-off landed right as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/20b-out-of-global-equity-funds-iran-israel/

data.title: On-chain Wealth Turns Deadly: Crypto Kidnapping in Paris Forces Victim to Hand Over Ledger Wallet
data.description:
Paris investigators have handled a kidnapping in Maisons-Alfort where a 23-year-old crypto holder was forced to surrender cash and a Ledger wallet, the tenth crypto-linked abduction in France this year amid a wider European rise in violent ‘wrench attacks’ against digital asset owners.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/paris-crypto-kidnapping-ledger-keys/

data.title: Trump imposes new sanctions on Iran, putting oil prices at even more risk
data.description:
Trump on Friday ordered new sanctions against Iran, targeting companies, vessels, and individuals accused of supplying Tehran’s military programs. The US Treasury announced the crackdown from Washington, hitting eight entities, one person, and one ship involved in moving sensitive tools used to build missiles, drones, and other weapons. The administration said the decision is aimed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-imposes-new-sanctions-on-iran/

data.title: Japan scraps US trade and diplomacy meeting over defense spending
data.description:
Japan just shut down a high-level meeting with the United States after the Trump administration increased its demand for defense spending without warning. The summit, which was supposed to happen on July 1 in Washington, was part of the annual “2+2” talks between top officials from both countries. On the US side, Secretary of State […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-scraps-us-trade-and-diplomacy-meeting/

data.title: Pumpfun reportedly delays token auction to July amid legal troubles
data.description:
Pump. fun has delayed its public token sale once again, extending months of uncertainty for users and investors as the popular Solana-based launchpad wrestles with a flurry of lawsuits, Colin Wu reported on June 20. Pump. fun had aimed to raise $1 billion at a $4 billion valuation through its token auction originally set for June 25
source: https://cryptoslate.com/pumpfun-reportedly-delays-token-auction-to-july-amid-legal-troubles/

data.title: HashDit Warns of CoinMarketCap Website Compromise
data.description: The Web3 security firm HashDit stated on X, “We have noticed reports indicating that the CoinMarketCap front-end website has been attacked and compromised. Please do not interact with the website at this time.” Users are advised to exercise caution and remain vigilant.

data.title: Uber Races Into AI Data Labeling as Meta’s $14.8B Scale Deal Sparks Mass Defections – Who’s Next?
data.description:
Uber has widened its AI ambitions, renaming its data-services division Uber AI Solutions and offering external access to proprietary datasets, clickworker labeling teams and project-automation software. source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uber-ai-data-labeling-meta-scale-deal/

data.title: Bitcoin Bullish Divergence That Appeared Before The May ATH Has Returned Again
data.description:
Bitcoin is currently hovering in a tightly compressed price range after failing multiple times to break above $110,000 earlier this month. The past few days have been characterized by the leading cryptocurrency trading around $105,000, with neither bulls nor bears taking control. Despite the overall consolidation, a subtle yet significant signal is starting to flash beneath the surface, particularly on the 4-hour chart, that might send Bitcoin to a new all-time high soon. Return Of Rare Divergence Pattern On Bitcoin’s 4H Chart Crypto analyst Luca (@CrypticTrades_) took to social media platform X to share a chart that highlights an important technical development on Bitcoin’s 4-hour timeframe: the return of a bullish divergence
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-bullish-divergence/
